highlights.title: Chinese AI models are gaining ground with U.S. companies as OpenAI, Anthropic costs surge
highlights.description: Recent model releases from Chinese companies including DeepSeek and Z.ai are seen by many as highly competitive compared to leading U.S. frontier systems.

highlights.title: SpaceX Joins Nasdaq 100 as Wall Street Makes Bullish Calls
highlights.description: SpaceX joins the Nasdaq 100 Index Tuesday as Wall Street brokerages launch coverage of Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company with a clear consensus: buy the stock.

highlights.title: ECB Asks Banks for Plans to Address AI Cybersecurity Threats
highlights.description: Europe’s banking regulator asked banks to come up with plans to address the growing threat from frontier artificial intelligence models such as Anthropic PBC’s Claude Mythos to cybersecurity.

highlights.title: Google and RWE Back German Nuclear Startup Proxima Fusion at €2.4 Billion Valuation
highlights.description: German startup Proxima Fusion has raised €411 million ($469 million) from a range of investors, including national energy firm RWE AG and Alphabet Inc.’s Google, to develop a nuclear fusion plant it hopes will be operational in the 2030s.

highlights.title: Apple veteran's Chinese smart-glasses firm becomes unicorn as Tencent, Meituan fund rival to Meta
highlights.description: The Shenzhen-based startup joined a slew of global peers to build advanced gadgets and electronics that bring the benefits of AI to individual users.

highlights.title: Samsung chip division's single-year profits beat its past 40 years of profits, combined — Samsung passes Nvidia to become most profitable company in the world
highlights.description: Brokerage consensus puts Samsung's full-year 2026 operating profit near 300 trillion won.

highlights.title: xAI is now officially known as SpaceXAI
highlights.description: The xAI account on X has announced its official rebranding to SpaceXAI, five months after it merged with SpaceX.

highlights.title: Google backs nuclear fusion startup targeting Europe’s first commercial power plant
highlights.description: Proxima Fusion has raised $468 million as it looks to move towards commercializing the promising but infamously difficult technical challenge of nuclear fusion.

highlights.title: Intel patent reveals new XBM memory architecture that ditches HBM's costly silicon interposer — backend-transistor DRAM stack uses UCIe links and built-in repair to ease AI's memory bottleneck
highlights.description: Intel’s XBM patent proposes an HBM alternative that uses backend-transistor DRAM, UCIe chiplet links, and repair logic to reduce packaging costs and complexity.

highlights.title: Broadcom and Apple extend custom silicon pact to 2031
highlights.description: Probably an extension of long-running iThing innards arrangement, not a new custom AI accelerator deal

ai.title: Why Samsung’s Record Profit Failed to Impress Investors
ai.description: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold but failed to impress investors used to eye-catching growth from the suppliers of AI chips. Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin speaks with Constellation Research's Day Wang to understand what investors are thinking. (Source: Bloomberg)

ai.title: Samsung’s Soaring Profit Fails to Lift Shares
ai.description: Samsung's results are in the spotlight as investors try to gauge how long sky-high investments and valuations around AI will last. (Source: Bloomberg)

ai.title: Chinese Firms Leave Nvidia for Local AI Suppliers, Survey Shows
ai.description: Chinese companies are ditching Nvidia Corp.’s advanced accelerators in favor of domestic silicon, underscoring how tensions with the US are reshaping the AI infrastructure buildout and propelling Beijing’s ambitions to substitute American technology.

ai.title: MPs tell Brit government: Sort out your tech sovereignty or get left out in the cold
ai.description: Committee says Anthropic's brief US export ban shows UK can't even trust its allies to keep the AI lights on

ai.title: Asia Stocks Drop on Chip Selloff, Nasdaq Futures Down
ai.description: Asian equities fell as renewed selling in technology stocks, including Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc., deepened concerns that the AI-driven rally may have run ahead of itself. Futures for the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 Index retreated 1.1%, suggesting Monday’s rebound on Wall Street was losing momentum. European shares were also set for losses. Bloomberg's Avril Hong and Mark Cranfield report. (Source: Bloomberg)

ai.title: AI Won’t Bring Back Era of Rapid Growth, Says Nobel Prize Winner
ai.description: A Nobel Prize-winning economist has warned that artificial intelligence will not return Western economies to the era of rapid productivity growth, which may be gone forever.

ai.title: 9to5Mac Daily: July 7, 2026 – New iPad Pro and MacBook Pro rumors
ai.description:
Listen to a recap of the top stories of the day from 9to5Mac. 9to5Mac Daily is available on iTunes and Apple’s Podcasts app, Stitcher, TuneIn, Google Play, or through our dedicated RSS feed for Overcast and other podcast players.
Sponsored by Backblaze: Backup you can rely on. Save 20% with code 9to5daily.

ai.title: Apple @ Work Podcast: The 3 pillars of AI for the Apple enterprise
ai.description:
Apple @ Work is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle, the only Apple Unified Platform. Mosyle is the only solution that integrates in a single professional-grade platform all the solutions necessary to seamlessly and automatically deploy, manage & protect Apple devices at work. Over 45,000 organizations trust Mosyle to make millions of Apple devices work-ready with no effort and at an affordable cost. Request your EXTENDED TRIAL today and understand why Mosyle is everything you need to work with Apple.
In this episode of Apple @ Work, Matt Vlasach, SVP of Enterprise Product and Solutions Engineering at Jamf joins the show to talk about their recent survey around AI usage amongst Apple focused enterprise.

ai.title: Samsung’s profits jump 19x in a year and you don’t need AI to figure out why
ai.description: Share price down sharply, apparently amid fears the bubble is getting bigger

chips_cloud.title: Meta is facing $1.4 trillion in state lawsuits over social media addiction
chips_cloud.description: Meta is facing a massive lawsuit from four US states over the addictive designs of its platforms.

ev_autonomous.title: Tesla in-cabin camera fails to prevent 60 mph naps as Wisk Aero faces lawsuit
ev_autonomous.description: On today’s surveillance-heavy episode of Quick Charge, it sure looks like Tesla’s in-cabin driver cam failed to stop one woman from falling asleep at the wheel, but safety and attention monitoring may not be the end game for that camera after all.
